title: Review and Act on Usability Testing Feedback Wave 1
description:
Review usability testing feedback from the first wave of testers and identify actionable improvements. Feedback collected from 6 users via the usability survey form.

## Key Findings
- Users most interested in data governance features as a next priority
- Feedback about slow loading times when selecting objects in the Dictionary — fields fetched from Salesforce via AJAX on each checkbox click causes noticeable delay

## Proposed Improvements (from developer)
1. **Background field fetching**: When a user checks an object, immediately store the selection and fetch fields in the background. If the user navigates to the object detail before fields are loaded, show a loading indicator with a message.
2. **Cache objects locally**: Instead of fetching available Salesforce objects on every page load, cache them in the database on first fetch and provide a refresh button to re-sync.
acceptance_criteria: Usability feedback from all respondents reviewed
Actionable improvements identified and documented as tickets
Performance improvement proposals for Dictionary object loading documented
implementation_notes: This was a review/analysis task, not a direct code change. Developer proposed two performance improvements for Dictionary object loading: background AJAX fetching and local object caching. These would be implemented in separate tickets.
comment_summary: Product owner shared usability feedback showing data governance as the most requested feature. Developer reviewed feedback, proposed background field fetching and object caching to address load time complaints, and requested a meeting to align on implementation priorities. Six users provided feedback in total.
